subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who hearest the clamour of the lovers from every horizon and the cry of the yearning ones from every quarter and the lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تسمع ضجیج العشاق من کل الافاق و صریخ المشتاقین من کل الاشطار و نوح
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
